title: How How to Start Selling Digital Products with Crypto Works and How to Set It Up Today
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine spending months creating an ebook on African culture, only to find out that your favorite payment processor, PayPal, has blocked your account due to 'unusual activity'. You're left with a product that can't be sold. This is a reality for many digital creators in Kenya who rely on traditional payment processors that don't work with their bank. It's frustrating, demotivating, and worst of all, it's a threat to your livelihood. You need a reliable and secure way to sell your digital products using cryptocurrency, and today, we'll show you how to set it up.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe often block accounts due to 'unusual activity', which can be a result of various factors such as high transaction volume, bank restrictions, or even just a misunderstanding. This leaves digital creators in a bind, unable to sell their products. However, with the rise of cryptocurrency and platforms like Unchained Commerce, you can now sell your digital products without relying on traditional payment processors. The Web3 Wallet Connect plugin ($19.99) allows you to integrate a secure and reliable payment system that's not subject to the same restrictions as traditional payment processors.
What You Need Before You Start

To get started, you'll need a few things: a digital product to sell, a cryptocurrency wallet, and a platform to host your digital products. You can use platforms like Gumroad or Sellfy to host your products, but keep in mind that they may have restrictions on certain countries or currencies. For a more seamless experience, consider using a platform that supports cryptocurrency payments, such as Unchained Commerce. Additionally, you'll need to set up a cryptocurrency wallet to receive payments. You can use a hardware wallet like Ledger or a software wallet like MetaMask.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Once you have your digital product and cryptocurrency wallet set up, it's time to configure your payment and delivery pipeline. You'll need to integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect plugin ($19.99) into your platform, which allows customers to pay for your digital products using cryptocurrency. You'll also need to set up automated delivery, which will send the digital product to the customer's email address once payment is confirmed. This ensures that customers receive their products immediately after payment, without any added hassle.
Traditional payment processors often have restrictions on certain countries or currencies, but cryptocurrency payments are not subject to the same limitations.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Now that your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live and make your first sale. You can promote your digital product on social media, forums, or email marketing campaigns to reach a wider audience. When a customer makes a purchase, the Web3 Wallet Connect plugin will automatically send the digital product to their email address, and you'll receive the payment in cryptocurrency. This process is seamless and efficient, allowing you to focus on creating more digital products and growing your audience.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once your system is running smoothly and you're making regular sales, it's time to scale and grow your business. You can use the analytics provided by Unchained Commerce to track your sales, customer engagement, and other key metrics. This data will help you make informed decisions about your business, such as optimizing your pricing, improving your product offerings, or expanding your marketing efforts. With the Web3 Wallet Connect plugin and Unchained Commerce, you can scale your business and reach a wider audience without worrying about payment restrictions or technical issues.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

We get it: you're worried about getting blocked by PayPal or Stripe again. Our system uses cryptocurrency and doesn't rely on traditional payment processors, so you don't have to worry about getting blocked. We've helped hundreds of digital creators in Kenya and other countries set up their own payment and delivery pipelines using Web3 Wallet Connect and Unchained Commerce.
Automated delivery ensures that customers receive their digital products immediately after payment, without any added hassle.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about cryptocurrency and its applications in e-commerce, we recommend checking out our article on 'Cryptocurrency and E-commerce: A Match Made in Heaven'. Additionally, you can explore other digital products and services offered by Unchained Commerce, such as the Admin Dashboard and Full Stack Bundle. The Web3 Wallet Connect plugin is just one of the many tools available to help you succeed in the digital marketplace.
Your Action Checklist

To get started with selling digital products using cryptocurrency, follow these concrete action steps: Create a digital product that you want to sell, such as an ebook or course. Set up a cryptocurrency wallet to receive payments. Choose a platform to host your digital products, such as Gumroad or Sellfy. Integrate the Web3 Wallet Connect plugin ($19.99) into your platform. Configure automated delivery to send digital products to customers' email addresses. Test your payment and delivery pipeline to ensure seamless transactions. Promote your digital product on social media, forums, or email marketing campaigns. Monitor your analytics to track sales, customer engagement, and other key metrics. Optimize your pricing, improve your product offerings, or expand your marketing efforts based on the data you collect.

The Web3 Wallet Connect plugin and Unchained Commerce provide a seamless and efficient payment and delivery pipeline, allowing you to focus on creating more digital products and growing your audience.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
